summary: App update: add a new layout section on the homepage within the scare-actor audition area highlighting "food, training, and scary vibes" while keeping the existing audition date range unchanged.

existing_features.title: Update the homepage Auditions section (scare-actor audition area) to include a new, clearly separated layout block that highlights three items: Food, Training, and Scary Vibes. This block must be visually consistent with the existing Auditions card styling (badges/cards/accents) and appear within the Auditions section content on the homepage.
Preserve the existing audition date range and audition hours currently shown in the Auditions section; do not change the displayed dates/times when adding the new layout block.

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage: add a layout section in the scare-actor audition area for Food, Training, and Scary Vibes details (keep existing audition dates unchanged)

projectName: Add Food/Training/Scary Vibes layout to the homepage Auditions section
